hero.title: Wake up in Valladolid and discover the Eastern Maya of Yucatán.
hero.subtitle: Cenotes, living cities and authentic routes beyond the usual.
hero.search_placeholder: Search a destination, an experience, a flavor…
hero.search_helper: Only if you already know what you're looking for

sections.destinations_sub: Each one has its own character. Start with the one that calls you.
sections.categories_sub: Choose by feeling, not by what's being sold.
sections.routes_sub: Itineraries built to live the territory, not to rush through it.
sections.alux_body: If you visit Valladolid, give the Eastern Maya at least one full day — it will take you further than any map.
sections.ayv_sub: Your personal travel file. Save destinations, experiences and notes. Your human concierge gets it when you're ready.
sections.envivo_sub: What's happening today on the ground. Soon connected to Instagram and Facebook.
sections.empresas_sub: Sorted by the Smart Visibility Engine, not by who pays the most.
sections.reviews_sub: Real voices, carefully translated and summarised.

footer.tagline: Official platform of the Eastern Maya of Yucatán.
